allow: Bash(xcodebuild -project Reflections.xcodeproj -scheme Reflections -sdk macosx build CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO)

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x for x in v if x.startswith\('4.'\)][-10:]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); stable=[x for x in v if 'nightly' not in x and 'alpha' not in x and 'rc' not in x]; print\([x for x in stable if x.startswith\('0.5'\) or x.startswith\('0.6'\) or x.startswith\('0.7'\) or x.startswith\('0.8'\)]\)")
